message:
🌱 Add Copilot DCO override workflow (#3685)

Uses reusable workflow from kubestellar/infra to automatically
set DCO status to success for Copilot-authored PRs.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+name: Copilot DCO
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
+
+jobs:
+  copilot-dco:
+    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-copilot-dco.yml@main
